title: CCL - Put the app in the background
scenario: CCL setting persists correctly when app is backgrounded and foregrounded in Device Settings > Advanced
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Advanced.
3. Locate the Call/Chat Control Lock (CCL) setting and note its current state (e.g., ON or OFF).
4. Press the Home button or recent apps button to send the app to the background.
5. Wait a few seconds, then bring the app back to the foreground (e.g., tap the app icon or select it from recent apps).
6. Navigate back to Device Settings → Advanced and observe the CCL setting.
expected: The previously selected CCL setting (ON or OFF) is still displayed correctly after bringing the app back to the foreground.
